name: Butterscotch Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Add the sugar and flour to the melted butter. Mix well until combined.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, mixing after each addition.
4. Pour in the water. Mix gently.
5. Fold in the grated coconut, chocolate chips, and chopped walnuts.
6. Grease a 9 x 13-inch pan.
7. Spread the batter evenly in the prepared pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes, or until set.
